text:
The quantity of a drug, service, or product that is rendered/dispensed for a prescription, on a specific 
date of service, or billing time span. 

SHORT NAME: ACTL_SRVC_QTY 

LONG NAME: ACTL_SRVC_QTY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP line 
LT line 
OT line 

VALUES: Valid numeric value, three decimal places. 

Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: — 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
